Metadata.title: Startrace Content Assistant
Metadata.description: A creator workspace for research, content creation, publishing and review.

Navigation.creator: Multi-platform creator
Navigation.workflowBody: Research, creation, publishing and review stay separate, with evidence and versions preserved at every step.
Navigation.dependencyWarning: Dependencies are not ready: database {database}, Redis {redis}. Related actions will fail explicitly; demo data will not be used.

SignIn.title: Sign in to Startrace
SignIn.description: Startrace is in a limited invite-only beta. Enter your email and invite code for a one-time sign-in link. Returning users only need their email.
SignIn.error: Sign-in could not be completed. Check the email, invite code, and remaining capacity, or confirm that this email is already registered.
SignIn.inviteCodeHelp: Required for first registration; optional for returning or directly invited users.

Creator.title: Multi-platform creation package
Creator.description: Choose 1–5 platforms and one content language. Each result can be edited, retried and exported independently.
Creator.foreignDisabled: Global-platform creation is not enabled in this environment.
Creator.targetLanguageHelp: This affects publishable fields only. The interface and risk guidance stay in the current UI language.
Creator.briefPlaceholder: Describe the topic, audience, core argument, factual boundaries and desired action…
Creator.noSkills: No generation Skills are currently enabled.
Creator.emptyBatch: Submit a brief to see each platform task here independently.
Creator.downloadReady: The current package is ready to download. Failed platforms are listed explicitly in the manifest.
Creator.editHelp: Edits apply only to this platform. Saving creates a new version and preserves history.

Tasks.waitingInput: More information is required before this task can continue.

BuiltinSkills.rewriteDescription: Change only the selected block and preserve the surrounding structure.
BuiltinSkills.hookDescription: Make the opening concrete and clarify reader value quickly without false exaggeration.
BuiltinSkills.compressDescription: Remove repetition, empty setup and filler.
BuiltinSkills.visualDescription: Improve graphic hierarchy or video shot direction alongside the copy.
BuiltinSkills.riskDescription: Check absolute, misleading and unsupported claims.

Publish.title: Publishing
Publish.description: Connected publishing is available for domestic platforms. Global platforms are export-only for now.
Publish.foreignNotice: This is global-platform content. Download its ZIP package from the creation session and publish it manually.
Publish.exportOnlyBody: These items can only be downloaded as ZIP packages from their creation sessions and published manually. No publishing records or fictional metrics will be created.
Publish.assetTypeError: Only image or video files are supported.
Publish.xhsImageOnly: Xiaohongshu graphic posts accept images only.
Publish.simulatedAsset: Simulated asset registered; no real file was uploaded.
Publish.mockSubmitted: The simulated publish entered the local state machine; nothing was sent to a real platform.
Publish.submitFailed: Could not submit the publishing task.
Publish.mockModeBody: The publishing flow uses a local state machine and contract fixtures. It does not call AiToEarn, upload real assets or publish to a real platform. Real publishing must be enabled explicitly in the deployment environment.
Publish.handoffBody: The matching content is preselected. Review its version, choose an account, upload assets and confirm manually; the system never auto-publishes.
Publish.handoffMissing: The handed-off content is missing, belongs to another account or has no saved version. The default list is shown instead.
Publish.newPublishDescription: Confirm the content version, platform account, assets and timing. Repeated clicks use the same idempotency key and do not create duplicates.
Publish.noPublishableBody: Save at least one content version in the creator workspace first.
Publish.connectionMissingTitle: Connection not configured: accounts cannot be loaded
Publish.connectionInvalidTitle: Credential invalid: accounts cannot be loaded
Publish.connectionUnavailableTitle: Connection not ready: accounts cannot be loaded
Publish.connectionMissingBody: Save an AiToEarn API key and authorize an account first. Mock accounts are never substituted.
Publish.connectionInvalidBody: The AiToEarn credential is invalid or revoked. Replace it in Connections and try again.
Publish.connectionUnavailableBody: Account loading failed because of a credential or provider issue. Mock accounts are never substituted.
Publish.uploadHelp: The selected files are uploaded directly to the provider-signed destination.
Publish.idempotencyNotice: If the provider times out, the system checks for an existing record before retrying. When Douyin requires user confirmation, open the short link to finish in Douyin.
Publish.recentPublishesHelp: Status refreshes every two seconds and stops after reaching a terminal state.
Publish.awaitingUserBody: Open the short link on a phone and complete the publishing confirmation in Douyin.
Publish.shortLinkMissing: The provider has not returned a short link. Refresh the status.
Publish.publishFailedSafe: Publishing failed ({code}). Review the connection and try again.
Publish.publishFailedUnknown: Publishing failed without a provider reason.

Connections.title: Connections
Connections.description: Configure the default generation model plus data, transcription and publishing services.
Connections.encryptionTitle: Connections belong only to the signed-in account
Connections.encryptionBody: Each user's model, data and publishing credentials are stored separately with AES-256-GCM encryption. The browser, API responses and logs never return the original key, and server model keys are never used as an implicit fallback for personal tasks.
Connections.modelsDescription: ChatGPT, Grok and DeepSeek use one generation interface. Only the provider marked as default is used for new tasks.
Connections.integrationsDescription: These credentials are used for source parsing, transcription and publishing, not default model selection.

providerPurposes.tikhub: Public or authorized Xiaohongshu and Douyin account, post and metric parsing
providerPurposes.youtube_data: Sync public metrics for historical videos with your own YouTube Data API key
providerPurposes.x_api: Optional official X API priority; public OSINT works without credentials
providerPurposes.aitoearn: Account authorization, asset upload, publishing and record retrieval
providerPurposes.firecrawl: Optional import for ordinary public web pages

Connections.keyStoredHelp: The key is encrypted and its original value is never shown again after saving.
Connections.modelNameHelp: Use a model ID currently available to this account.
Connections.authorizeNextHelp: After saving the API key, authorize Xiaohongshu and Douyin accounts separately.
Connections.defaultFailed: Could not change the default model.
Connections.authOpenedHelp: Complete authorization, then return here to check account status.
Connections.publishAuthDescription: Save the AiToEarn API key, then authorize each platform account. Users only see their own authorized accounts.
Connections.publishNotConfiguredBody: Save an AiToEarn API key before account authorization, direct asset upload or publishing. Mock data is never substituted.
Connections.publishInvalidBody: Replace the credential in the AiToEarn card above, then retry authorization.
Connections.authorizedAccountsConnectedHelp: Select “Sync account status” to view current publishing accounts.
Connections.authorizedAccountsHelp: Authorized accounts appear here after the connection is complete.
Connections.authorizedAccountsEmpty: No authorized accounts yet. Complete platform authorization first.
Connections.publishRulesTitle: Platform publishing rules (local guardrails; provider rules prevail)
Connections.xhsCookieDescription: For local development and sources the user is authorized to access only.
Connections.xhsCookieBody: Configure it under Trend research → Source connections in development. Production must use a per-user encrypted credential, never a server-local JSON file.

Skills.title: Skill settings
Skills.description: Manage reusable creation methods and choose them explicitly for each creation.
Skills.noticeTitle: Skills are combined into supplemental creation guidance
Skills.noticeBody: This version supports instruction-only Skills. It does not execute uploaded code or arbitrary remote URLs. Up to eight Skills can be selected, and every task preserves the Skill snapshot used at generation time.
Skills.builtinDescription: Maintained by the system and available to enable or disable. Whole-document Skills appear in the creator’s multi-select list.
Skills.customDescription: Save your writing method, repeatable structure, brand voice or review checklist.
Skills.formDescription: Describe when the Skill applies and exactly what it should do. Multiple Skills can be combined.
Skills.name: Name
Skills.purposePlaceholder: When should this Skill be selected?
Skills.instructionsPlaceholder: Write in first person; start with a concrete scene; summarize the method without sounding preachy…
Skills.secretWarning: Include creation rules only. Never enter API keys, passwords or other secrets.
Skills.emptyDescription: Save a creation method you often find yourself repeating.
Skills.patchOnly: This Skill applies only to the selected content block.
Skills.validation: Complete the name, purpose and instructions.
Skills.confirmDelete: Delete “{name}”? Existing task snapshots will be preserved.

Errors.generic: The action failed. Try again shortly.
Errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
Errors.validation: The submitted data is invalid. Review it and try again.
Errors.notFound: The requested item does not exist or belongs to another account.
Errors.conflict: The state has changed. Refresh and try again.
Errors.dependencyUnavailable: A required service is temporarily unavailable.
Errors.publishingNotSupported: This platform is export-only for now.
Errors.credentialRequired: Configure a real, working model credential first.
Errors.credentialInvalid: The credential is invalid or expired. Update it and try again.
Errors.referenceBlocked: The page could not be fetched safely. Paste a summary you have permission to use.
Errors.jobFailed: The task failed. Retry it when ready.
Errors.provider: The external service is temporarily unavailable.
Errors.generationFailed: The model did not return content that matches the platform format.
Errors.styleProfileRequired: Approve the style profile before generating content.
Errors.scoringNotSupported: This platform uses a format checklist instead of domestic-platform scoring.
Errors.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled in the current environment.
Errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
